SHEroes in STEMSaturday, March 7Celebrate International Women’s Day at SHEroes in STEM, a hands-on event that highlights the impact of women in science, technology, engineering, and math. Families and young learners are invited to explore diverse STEM industries through interactive activities, meet inspiring role models, and discover the stories of how women have shaped, and continue to shape, STEM careers around the world.Get Tickets

Super STEM SaturdaysSaturday, March 289:00 AMThe amazing world of STEM takes center stage at Thanksgiving Point.Each Super STEM Saturday transforms one of our discovery centers into a hands-on adventure zone where kids and families can explore science, technology, engineering, and math through exciting, themed activity tables and programs.From rocket launches and coding challenges to pollinator labs and farm tech experiments, every Super STEM Saturday invites kids and families to discover the wonder of how things work.Get Tickets

Curiosity CircusSaturday, April 410:00 AMJoin Curious George and the Man with the Yellow Hat for a circus-inspired day of hands-on STEM adventures at the Museum of Natural Curiosity.Build, test, balance, spin, and explore as you discover the science behind the circus acts. From juggling and tightrope walking to a carousel and magic, kids including forces of gravity, motion, simple machines, and problem-solving.Get Tickets
